text: Which one of the listed requirements regarding the stowage of a survival craft corresponds to present SOLAS regulations? Each survival craft shall be stowed:

options.text: In a state of readiness so that two crew members can prepare
On the starboard side of the ship
In a secure and sheltered position and protected from damage by fire and explosion

explanation: SOLAS mandates that survival craft must be stowed in a state of readiness, so that two crew members can prepare them for launching within the prescribed time limits.
